com.burningcode.jira.rest
Class WatcherResource

java.lang.Object
  com.burningcode.jira.rest.WatcherResource

public class WatcherResource
extends Object

Used for access watcher info for an issue using REST API TODO Replace @AnonymousAllowed TODO Check for user permissions to access watcher info.

Author:
rbarham

isUserPermitted

protected boolean isUserPermitted(com.atlassian.jira.issue.Issue issue)
Checks if a user the authenticated user has the "View Voters and Watchers" permission.

Parameters:
issue - The issue the user is trying to view watchers.
Returns:
True if has permissions, false otherwise.
